description: Child tries to create a username that already exists.
expected_behavior: Prompt for another name or offer parent help.

description: Child enters a wrong 4-digit PIN multiple times.
expected_behavior: Slow retries and offer parent-assisted recovery.

description: Parent links to the wrong child profile.
expected_behavior: Provide a correction flow before exposing full progress history.

description: Tester returns after browser data is cleared.
expected_behavior: Restore progress from server-side profile state.

description: Child repeatedly asks for content above their readiness.
expected_behavior: Offer a safer nearby challenge and fall back to guided mode.

description: Child skips an explainer after a wrong answer.
expected_behavior: Offer a shorter hint path and guided retry.

description: Audio is disabled during a voice-led explanation.
expected_behavior: Swap to visual and text-light support.

description: Parent submits a vague bug report with no screen or session reference.
expected_behavior: Prompt for key metadata or tag as low-context feedback.
